name: rekrut-ai
description: AI-powered recruitment platform with AI Interview Coach, Skill Assessments, and Profile Matching

scripts.install:all: npm run install:api && npm run install:app
scripts.build:all: npm run build:api && npm run build:app
scripts.db:push: cd api && npx prisma db push
scripts.deploy:api: cd api && npm run build && npm start
